description: Skill registry for MiganCore — declarative tool definitions with permission model.

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the web for current information using Tavily or SerpAPI

skills.name: Python REPL
skills.description: Execute Python code in a sandboxed environment

skills.name: Memory Write
skills.description: Write a fact to long-term memory

skills.name: Memory Search
skills.description: Search long-term memory semantically via Qdrant

skills.name: Spawn Agent
skills.description: Create a new child agent with inherited persona

skills.name: Read File
skills.description: MANDATORY for reading file content: invoke this function whenever the user asks to read, open, view, show, or check the content of a file. Returns the file contents as text (capped at 50KB). For directory listings, pass a directory path.

skills.name: HTTP GET
skills.description: Make an HTTP GET request to an external API

skills.name: Generate Image
skills.description: MANDATORY for image generation: invoke this function whenever the user requests an image, picture, illustration, visual, artwork, banner, or any visual asset. Do NOT describe the image or generate code — call this function directly. Uses fal.ai FLUX schnell, returns a URL to the generated image (~3-8s).

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate

skills.name: Text to Speech
skills.description: MANDATORY for voice/audio output: invoke this function whenever the user asks for audio narration, spoken response, or text-to-speech. Generates MP3 via ElevenLabs (free tier 10k chars/month). Returns base64-encoded audio.

text.description: Text to synthesize (max 2500 chars per call)

voice_id.description: Optional ElevenLabs voice ID. Default: Rachel (21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM)

skills.name: Write File
skills.description: MANDATORY for creating/writing files: invoke this function whenever the user asks to create, write, save, or generate a file (script, config, document, code, etc.). Do NOT describe the action or instruct the user to do it manually — call this function directly. Creates parent directories automatically. Sandboxed to agent's workspace.

path.description: File path relative to workspace (e.g. 'script.py' or 'src/main.py')

content.description: Text content to write to the file

skills.name: Analyze Image
skills.description: MANDATORY when the user attaches, references, or asks about an image: invoke this function to describe the image content, transcribe text in it, or answer specific questions about what is shown. Bilingual ID/EN. Backed by Gemini 2.5 Flash Vision (cheap, fast) with Claude Sonnet 4.5 fallback.

image_url.description: HTTPS URL to the image (jpg/png/webp). Provide either this or image_base64.

image_base64.description: Base64-encoded image bytes. Use only when no URL is available.

mime_type.description: Image mime type (e.g. 'image/jpeg', 'image/png'). Required if using image_base64.

question.description: What to ask about the image. Default: 'Describe this image in detail.'
question.default: Describe this image in detail. List notable elements and any visible text.

lang.description: Response language: 'id' for Indonesian, 'en' for English.
